message.content:
<deliberation>
Summary: Reviewed the provided policy chunk against each main REG node and, where applicable, their cross-referenced Articles. The policy contains general commitments to conduct and document evaluations and to provide customer-facing documentation on intended uses and fitness-for-purpose. It does not introduce constraints that contradict, narrow, or negate the regulatory requirements in REG-030 (Art13(6)), REG-031 (Art13(7)), or REG-032 (Art13(8)) and its referenced Articles 12 and 14. Most elements required by these Articles (e.g., explainability-related technical capabilities, group-specific performance, input/training/validation/testing data specifications, human oversight measures, logging mechanisms, computational/hardware resources, lifetime, maintenance) are simply not addressed in the policy chunk. Per instruction 4, omissions are treated as Non-Deviation.
</deliberation>
